title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Federal Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Federal Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Federal Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
